title: Ideogram Cheat Sheet
description: Quick guide for generating and customizing images with Ideogram.

commands.command: Create an image of a sunset
commands.description: Generates an image depicting a sunset scene.
commands.scenario: When you need a visual of a sunset for a presentation or project.

commands.description: Creates an image of a cartoon character based on your description.
commands.scenario: When you need a unique cartoon character for a story or animation.

commands.description: Overlays custom text onto an existing image.
commands.scenario: When you want to add captions or labels to an image.

commands.description: Changes the dimensions of an image to 1080x1080 pixels.
commands.scenario: When you need to adjust an image size for social media posts.

commands.description: Improves the quality and resolution of an image.
commands.scenario: When an image appears blurry or pixelated.

commands.command: Convert image to black and white
commands.description: Transforms a color image into black and white.
commands.scenario: When you want a classic or vintage look for an image.

commands.description: Combines multiple images into a single collage.
commands.scenario: When you want to showcase a collection of images together.

commands.description: Creates a custom logo based on your input and style preferences.
commands.scenario: When starting a new brand or project and need a logo.

commands.description: Adds a vintage effect to an image.
commands.scenario: When you want to give an image a retro look.

commands.description: Generates an infographic based on provided data and style.
commands.scenario: When you need to visually present data or statistics.

commands.description: Eliminates the background from an image, leaving only the main subject.
commands.scenario: When you need a transparent background for product images.

commands.description: Creates a meme with your chosen image and text.
commands.scenario: When you want to create a humorous or viral image for social media.

commands.description: Places a watermark on an image to protect it.
commands.scenario: When you want to prevent unauthorized use of your images.

commands.description: Transforms a photo into a digital painting style image.
commands.scenario: When you want an artistic version of a photo.

commands.command: Use 'aspect ratio 16:9' for cinematic wide shots
commands.description: Specify a cinematic widescreen format by adding aspect ratio instructions to your prompt.
Direct the AI to use specific fonts like 'neon signage', '3D bubble letters', or 'elegant calligraphy' for your text.
Toggle the Magic Prompt feature to automatically turn simple ideas into highly detailed, descriptive instructions.
Create clean, professional 3D assets for websites or presentations using the 'isometric' keyword.
Use the Remix button to keep the composition of an image while changing only the style or color palette.
